overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in a yellow robe exploring a cozy, plant-filled common room with brick walls and wooden beams. The character walks through the warm, artificially lit space examining a bulletin board and observing the environment while other students sit in various seating areas.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the common room entrance toward the bulletin board area

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a green couch conversing

entered.detail: tall wooden bookshelf filled with books and potted plants on top
green upholstered couch with students seated on it
tall ornate wooden grandfather clock with visible pendulum
wooden notice board with papers pinned to it
green shaded floor lamp with brass stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the entrance area of the common room, passing a wooden bookshelf and a green couch where two NPC students are seated. The space features warm lighting, potted plants, and ornate rugs as the character approaches a grandfather clock and bulletin board.

scene_state.functional_zone: bulletin board area with notice papers

events.description: character stops walking to examine the papers on the bulletin board
character turns away from the bulletin board and walks toward the main common room

agents.ego_description: stopping to read the notices pinned to the bulletin board before continuing

notable_agents.action: student sitting alone in an armchair near the wall

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with carved banister leading upward
wall-mounted lantern with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character stops to examine the papers pinned to a wooden bulletin board next to a tall grandfather clock. After observing the notices, the character turns and walks away from the wall, revealing a curved wooden staircase on the right side of the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: central common room with round doorways

events.description: moving from the narrow wall area into the open central common room space

agents.ego_description: walking through the main common room area observing the various seating arrangements

notable_agents.action: group of students sitting on couches in the central seating area

entered.detail: large wooden support pillars with intricate Celtic-style carvings
distinctive circular hobbit-style doorways with wooden frames
upholstered orange armchairs arranged in seating groups
wooden coffee table with a bowl of green apples

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main common room area, which opens into a wider space with carved wooden pillars and distinctive round doorways. The room features multiple seating areas with orange armchairs and couches where NPC students are relaxing, surrounded by abundant potted plants and warm lamp light.

events.description: character stops to look up at the portrait paintings on the wall
character turns away from the wall and walks back toward the center

agents.ego_description: examining the portrait paintings and decorative items on the back wall

notable_agents.action: student sitting in an orange armchair reading a book

entered.detail: collection of framed portraits and landscape paintings on the brick wall
small wooden writing desk with a green banker's lamp
antique-style terrestrial globe on a wooden stand
ceramic plates mounted on the wall as decoration

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the back wall of the common room, which is decorated with framed portrait paintings and decorative plates. The character stops to observe the artwork and a wooden desk with a green lamp, while an NPC sits in a nearby orange armchair.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area to lower common room level

events.description: translucent ghostly figure of a student appears near the staircase
character descends through large archway into the lower level lounge

agents.ego_description: walking toward and descending through the archway to the lower level while passing a ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure standing near the stairs

entered.detail: large carved wooden archway leading to a lower level
sunken seating area visible through the archway with additional furniture

segments.scene_description: The character walks toward a large wooden archway leading to a lower level of the common room, passing a translucent ghostly figure near the curved staircase. The character descends through the archway into a lower lounge area with additional round doorways and seating visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow entranceway into the expansive, warm heart of a student common room. It begins by following the character past a wooden bookshelf and a green couch where students are seated, moving through a space filled with ornate rugs and potted plants. As the character approaches a grandfather clock, the camera pauses to examine notices pinned to a wooden bulletin board before turning away to reveal a curved wooden staircase. The scene then opens into a wider main area characterized by carved wooden pillars and distinctive round doorways. Finally, the camera glides through the heart of the room, passing multiple seating areas with orange armchairs and relaxing students bathed in soft lamp light.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a decorated upper gallery into a sunken lower lounge within the common room. It begins with the character approaching a back wall adorned with framed portraits and decorative plates, pausing briefly by a wooden desk illuminated by a green lamp. As the character moves away from the seated NPC in the orange armchair, the camera glides toward a large wooden archway. The scene then shifts as the character passes a translucent ghostly figure by a curved staircase, descending through the archway to reveal a lower level. Finally, the view opens up into a lounge area characterized by distant round doorways and additional seating.
